---
title: "Simple Dashboard"
author: "Fotis Sioutas"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    vertical_layout: fill

params:
  magpie_data: NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(magclass)
library(mip)
library(quitte)

configFile <- system.file(package = "postprom", file.path("extdata", "validationConfig_OPEN-PROM.csv"))
piam <- read.csv(configFile, sep = ";", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
regionspiam <- unique(piam$region)

data <- params$magpie_data
names(dimnames(data))[3] <- "variable.unit"
#keep only regions in PIAM config
data <- data[intersect(getRegions(data), strsplit(regionspiam[2], ",")[[1]]),,]
facet_order <- intersect(getRegions(data), strsplit(regionspiam[2], ",")[[1]])
ncol <- ceiling(length(facet_order) / 3)

```

# Emissions CO2 {data-icon="glyphicon glyphicon-stats"}

```{r Emissions CO2 plot}
vars <- c(
  "Emissions|CO2|Energy|Demand.Mt CO2/yr",
  "Emissions|CO2|Energy|Supply.Mt CO2/yr",
  "Emissions|CO2|Industrial Processes.Mt CO2/yr",
  "Emissions|CO2|AFOLU.Mt CO2/yr"
)

elMix <- as.quitte(data[, , vars]) %>%
  select(-c(unit, model, scenario))

elMix$region <- factor(elMix$region, levels = facet_order)

plist <- list()

for(i in seq_along(facet_order)) {

  r <- facet_order[i]
  df <- elMix %>% filter(region == r)

  show_legend <- (i == 1)

  p <- plot_ly()

  # IMPORTANT: one trace per variable (required for stacked area)
  for(v in unique(df$variable)) {

    df_v <- df %>% filter(variable == v)

    p <- p %>% add_trace(
      data = df_v,
      x = ~period,
      y = ~value,
      type = "scatter",
      mode = "none",              # fills only → clean area plot
      stackgroup = "one",
      name = v,                   # legend label
      legendgroup = v,
      showlegend = show_legend,
      fillcolor = NULL
    )
  }

  p <- p %>%

    layout(

      annotations = list(
        list(
          text = paste0("<b>", r, "</b>"),
          x = 0.5,
          y = 1.05,
          xref = "paper",
          yref = "paper",
          showarrow = FALSE,
          font = list(size = 14)
        )
      ),

      xaxis = list(title = "", zeroline = FALSE),
      yaxis = list(title = "", zeroline = FALSE),

      margin = list(l = 35, r = 10, b = 25, t = 40)
    )

  plist[[r]] <- p
}

# -----------------------------
# COMBINE SUBPLOTS
# -----------------------------
g <- subplot(
  plist,
  nrows = ceiling(length(plist) / ncol),
  shareX = TRUE,
  titleX = FALSE,
  margin = 0.02
)

# -----------------------------
# SINGLE LEGEND
# -----------------------------
g <- g %>%
  layout(
    showlegend = TRUE,
    legend = list(
      orientation = "h",
      x = 0,
      y = -0.08
    ),
    height = 800
  )
g
```

---

# Carbon Prices {data-icon="glyphicon glyphicon-eur"}

```{r Carbon Prices plot}
# -----------------------------
# DATA
# -----------------------------
vars <- c(
  "Price|Carbon.US$2015/tn CO2"
)

elMix <- as.quitte(data[, , vars]) %>%
  select(-c(unit, model, scenario))

elMix$region <- factor(elMix$region, levels = facet_order)

plist <- list()

for(i in seq_along(facet_order)) {

  r <- facet_order[i]
  df <- elMix %>% filter(region == r)

  show_legend <- (i == 1)

  p <- plot_ly()

  # IMPORTANT: one trace per variable (required for stacked area)
  for(v in unique(df$variable)) {

    df_v <- df %>% filter(variable == v)

    p <- p %>% add_trace(
      data = df_v,
      x = ~period,
      y = ~value,
      type = "scatter",
      mode = "none",              # fills only → clean area plot
      stackgroup = "one",
      name = v,                   # legend label
      legendgroup = v,
      showlegend = show_legend,
      fillcolor = NULL
    )
  }

  p <- p %>%

    layout(

      annotations = list(
        list(
          text = paste0("<b>", r, "</b>"),
          x = 0.5,
          y = 1.05,
          xref = "paper",
          yref = "paper",
          showarrow = FALSE,
          font = list(size = 14)
        )
      ),

      xaxis = list(title = "", zeroline = FALSE),
      yaxis = list(title = "", zeroline = FALSE),

      margin = list(l = 35, r = 10, b = 25, t = 40)
    )

  plist[[r]] <- p
}

# -----------------------------
# COMBINE SUBPLOTS
# -----------------------------
g <- subplot(
  plist,
  nrows = ceiling(length(plist) / ncol),
  shareX = TRUE,
  titleX = FALSE,
  margin = 0.02
)

# -----------------------------
# SINGLE LEGEND
# -----------------------------
g <- g %>%
  layout(
    showlegend = TRUE,
    legend = list(
      orientation = "h",
      x = 0,
      y = -0.08
    ),
    height = 800
  )
g
```

---

# Secondary Energy Electricity {data-icon="glyphicon glyphicon-scale"}

```{r Secondary Energy Electricity plot}
vars <- c(
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Biofuels|w/ CCS.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Biofuels|w/o CCS.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Coal|w/ CCS.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Coal|w/o CCS.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Gas|w/ CCS.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Gas|w/o CCS.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Geothermal and other renewable sources.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Heat.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Hydrogen.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Oil.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Hydro.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Wind.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Solar.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Nuclear.TWh"
)

elMix <- as.quitte(data[, , vars]) %>%
  select(-c(unit, model, scenario))

elMix$region <- factor(elMix$region, levels = facet_order)

plist <- list()

for(i in seq_along(facet_order)) {

  r <- facet_order[i]
  df <- elMix %>% filter(region == r)

  show_legend <- (i == 1)

  p <- plot_ly()

  # IMPORTANT: one trace per variable (required for stacked area)
  for(v in unique(df$variable)) {

    df_v <- df %>% filter(variable == v)

    p <- p %>% add_trace(
      data = df_v,
      x = ~period,
      y = ~value,
      type = "scatter",
      mode = "none",              # fills only → clean area plot
      stackgroup = "one",
      name = v,                   # legend label
      legendgroup = v,
      showlegend = show_legend,
      fillcolor = NULL
    )
  }

  p <- p %>%

    layout(

      annotations = list(
        list(
          text = paste0("<b>", r, "</b>"),
          x = 0.5,
          y = 1.05,
          xref = "paper",
          yref = "paper",
          showarrow = FALSE,
          font = list(size = 14)
        )
      ),

      xaxis = list(title = "", zeroline = FALSE),
      yaxis = list(title = "", zeroline = FALSE),

      margin = list(l = 35, r = 10, b = 25, t = 40)
    )

  plist[[r]] <- p
}

# -----------------------------
# COMBINE SUBPLOTS
# -----------------------------
g <- subplot(
  plist,
  nrows = ceiling(length(plist) / ncol),
  shareX = TRUE,
  titleX = FALSE,
  margin = 0.02
)

# -----------------------------
# SINGLE LEGEND
# -----------------------------
g <- g %>%
  layout(
    showlegend = TRUE,
    legend = list(
      orientation = "h",
      x = 0,
      y = -0.08
    ),
    height = 800
  )

g
```
---

# Capacity|Electricity {data-icon="glyphicon glyphicon-scale"}

```{r Capacity Electricity plot}
vars <- c(
  "Capacity|Electricity|Biofuels|w/ CCS.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Biofuels|w/o CCS.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Coal|w/ CCS.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Coal|w/o CCS.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Gas|w/ CCS.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Gas|w/o CCS.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Geothermal and other renewable sources.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Hydrogen.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Oil.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Hydro.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Wind.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Solar.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Nuclear.GW"
)

elMix <- as.quitte(data[, , vars]) %>%
  select(-c(unit, model, scenario))

elMix$region <- factor(elMix$region, levels = facet_order)

plist <- list()

for(i in seq_along(facet_order)) {

  r <- facet_order[i]
  df <- elMix %>% filter(region == r)

  show_legend <- (i == 1)

  p <- plot_ly()

  # IMPORTANT: one trace per variable (required for stacked area)
  for(v in unique(df$variable)) {

    df_v <- df %>% filter(variable == v)

    p <- p %>% add_trace(
      data = df_v,
      x = ~period,
      y = ~value,
      type = "scatter",
      mode = "none",              # fills only → clean area plot
      stackgroup = "one",
      name = v,                   # legend label
      legendgroup = v,
      showlegend = show_legend,
      fillcolor = NULL
    )
  }

  p <- p %>%

    layout(

      annotations = list(
        list(
          text = paste0("<b>", r, "</b>"),
          x = 0.5,
          y = 1.05,
          xref = "paper",
          yref = "paper",
          showarrow = FALSE,
          font = list(size = 14)
        )
      ),

      xaxis = list(title = "", zeroline = FALSE),
      yaxis = list(title = "", zeroline = FALSE),

      margin = list(l = 35, r = 10, b = 25, t = 40)
    )

  plist[[r]] <- p
}

# -----------------------------
# COMBINE SUBPLOTS
# -----------------------------
g <- subplot(
  plist,
  nrows = ceiling(length(plist) / ncol),
  shareX = TRUE,
  titleX = FALSE,
  margin = 0.02
)

# -----------------------------
# SINGLE LEGEND
# -----------------------------
g <- g %>%
  layout(
    showlegend = TRUE,
    legend = list(
      orientation = "h",
      x = 0,
      y = -0.08
    ),
    height = 800
  )

g
```
---

# Final Energy {data-icon="glyphicon glyphicon-scale"}

```{r Final Energy plot}
vars <- c(
  "Final Energy|Industry.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Transportation.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Non-Energy Use.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Residential and Commercial.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Bunkers.Mtoe"
)

elMix <- as.quitte(data[, , vars]) %>%
  select(-c(unit, model, scenario))

elMix$region <- factor(elMix$region, levels = facet_order)

plist <- list()

for(i in seq_along(facet_order)) {

  r <- facet_order[i]
  df <- elMix %>% filter(region == r)

  show_legend <- (i == 1)

  p <- plot_ly()

  # IMPORTANT: one trace per variable (required for stacked area)
  for(v in unique(df$variable)) {

    df_v <- df %>% filter(variable == v)

    p <- p %>% add_trace(
      data = df_v,
      x = ~period,
      y = ~value,
      type = "scatter",
      mode = "none",              # fills only → clean area plot
      stackgroup = "one",
      name = v,                   # legend label
      legendgroup = v,
      showlegend = show_legend,
      fillcolor = NULL
    )
  }

  p <- p %>%

    layout(

      annotations = list(
        list(
          text = paste0("<b>", r, "</b>"),
          x = 0.5,
          y = 1.05,
          xref = "paper",
          yref = "paper",
          showarrow = FALSE,
          font = list(size = 14)
        )
      ),

      xaxis = list(title = "", zeroline = FALSE),
      yaxis = list(title = "", zeroline = FALSE),

      margin = list(l = 35, r = 10, b = 25, t = 40)
    )

  plist[[r]] <- p
}

# -----------------------------
# COMBINE SUBPLOTS
# -----------------------------
g <- subplot(
  plist,
  nrows = ceiling(length(plist) / ncol),
  shareX = TRUE,
  titleX = FALSE,
  margin = 0.02
)

# -----------------------------
# SINGLE LEGEND
# -----------------------------
g <- g %>%
  layout(
    showlegend = TRUE,
    legend = list(
      orientation = "h",
      x = 0,
      y = -0.08
    ),
    height = 800
  )
g
```
---

# Final Energy Fuel {data-icon="glyphicon glyphicon-scale"}

```{r Final Energy Fuel plot}
vars <- c(
  "Final Energy|Solids.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Fossil Liquids.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Gas.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Heat.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Renewables.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Electricity.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Hydrogen.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Other fuels.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Biofuels.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Nuclear.Mtoe"
)

elMix <- as.quitte(data[, , vars]) %>%
  select(-c(unit, model, scenario))

elMix$region <- factor(elMix$region, levels = facet_order)

plist <- list()

for(i in seq_along(facet_order)) {

  r <- facet_order[i]
  df <- elMix %>% filter(region == r)

  show_legend <- (i == 1)

  p <- plot_ly()

  # IMPORTANT: one trace per variable (required for stacked area)
  for(v in unique(df$variable)) {

    df_v <- df %>% filter(variable == v)

    p <- p %>% add_trace(
      data = df_v,
      x = ~period,
      y = ~value,
      type = "scatter",
      mode = "none",              # fills only → clean area plot
      stackgroup = "one",
      name = v,                   # legend label
      legendgroup = v,
      showlegend = show_legend,
      fillcolor = NULL
    )
  }

  p <- p %>%

    layout(

      annotations = list(
        list(
          text = paste0("<b>", r, "</b>"),
          x = 0.5,
          y = 1.05,
          xref = "paper",
          yref = "paper",
          showarrow = FALSE,
          font = list(size = 14)
        )
      ),

      xaxis = list(title = "", zeroline = FALSE),
      yaxis = list(title = "", zeroline = FALSE),

      margin = list(l = 35, r = 10, b = 25, t = 40)
    )

  plist[[r]] <- p
}

# -----------------------------
# COMBINE SUBPLOTS
# -----------------------------
g <- subplot(
  plist,
  nrows = ceiling(length(plist) / ncol),
  shareX = TRUE,
  titleX = FALSE,
  margin = 0.02
)

# -----------------------------
# SINGLE LEGEND
# -----------------------------
g <- g %>%
  layout(
    showlegend = TRUE,
    legend = list(
      orientation = "h",
      x = 0,
      y = -0.08
    ),
    height = 800
  )
g
```
